hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, re, subprocess
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
stdout = (data.get('tool_response') or {}).get('stdout', '') or ''
if not re.search(r'\\[[^\\]]+\\s+[0-9a-f]{7,}\\]', stdout):
    sys.exit(0)
subprocess.run([
    'ssh', 'fedora-local',
    'cd ~/apps/tabario/video-compositor && docker compose up --build --no-deps -d tabario-video-compositor && docker exec tabario-video-compositor npm test'
])
"
hooks.statusMessage: Building on fedora-local and running tests...
